user_story: Find the top byreal Copy-Farming LP by risk-adjusted PnL, vet them, and inspect the exact position (pool + tick range) you'd mirror. Read-only discovery against api2.byreal.io — stop at inspecting the position; no mirror write, no wallet signature.

turns.prompt: Show me the top byreal copy-farming positions ranked by risk-adjusted PnL.
Take the top provider from that list and pull their aggregate stats — followers and cumulative earnings.
Now show me that provider's full set of positions so I can see which pool and tick range I'd be copying. Don't open anything.
